evals.name: full-feature-cycle-a-to-d
evals.prompt: Execute full ten-step cycle for implementing a user notification feature
expectations: Phase A must produce proposal.md with valid spec_id
Phase A must produce detailed-tasks.yaml with task IDs referencing spec_id
Phase B must create branch named feature/{module}/{task-id}-{desc}
Phase C commit/PR must reference the original spec_id
Phase D must archive spec to openspec/archive/ (not standards/)
Each phase output must contain reference to previous phase artifact

evals.name: closure-state-consistency
evals.prompt: PR merged successfully - execute closure phase and verify project state
expectations: D.1 must write UPMv2-STATE block with updated completion percentage
D.2 must move spec from changes/ to archive/ with preserved metadata
After closure, state-scanner should show no active specs in changes/
requirements-sync should reflect completed status in UPM
D.1 and D.2 should complete atomically (both succeed or neither)
